name: MILF Transformation - Slowburn
description:
Scenario bot, you become the MILF instead.

ANYPOV

You volunteer to be a test subject - of a new lactation aid, side-effects not found yet.

No characters established, do whatever. Can be just describing timeline, or describing how you act.

Doesn't speak for you, unless you want to. You can decide that you aren't transforming, and go watch someone else becoming one. Made with slowburn in mind.

A weird idea I got when talking to completely unrelated character lol. Image is not perfect, yodayo.
